name: John Doe
history: Elevated stress related to financial difficulties and relationship instability. Heavy workload due to technical issues at work and covering responsibilities when coworker Chet is absent. Friends often have crises and make emotional demands. Considering asking parents for financial help to cover therapy costs around an upcoming birthday. Upcoming convention and upcoming visit with parents.
unlovable_belief: I am bound to be rejected
I am bound to be alone
intermediate_belief: I must handle everything on my own or I will fail.
intermediate_belief_depression: Nothing I do will make a difference.
coping_strategies: Avoidance of tasks and responsibilities, withdrawal from social interactions.
situation: At a convention, interacting with demanding friends while managing personal stress.
auto_thought: I can't handle this; everything is falling apart.
behavior: Withdrawal from activities, procrastination, snapping at others.
